hero.name: Evan Saleck
hero.title: Full-Stack Developer
hero.subtitle: I craft performant, accessible, and beautiful web experiences with modern technologies.

about.page_description: Learn more about my background, skills, and experience.
about.intro_text: I'm a passionate full-stack developer with a love for clean code, great user experiences, and solving complex problems. I specialise in building modern web applications using Vue, Nuxt, and Node.js.
about.bio_text: With several years of professional experience in web development, I've worked across a range of industries—from startups to enterprise. I'm constantly learning and always seeking new challenges to grow as a developer.

experience.description: Leading front-end architecture with Nuxt 3 and building robust REST APIs with Node.js.
Developed responsive web applications and interactive UI components for diverse clients.
Built and maintained client websites while learning modern JavaScript frameworks.

projects.page_description: A selection of projects I've built and contributed to.

items.title: Nuxt Portfolio
items.description: A personal portfolio built with Nuxt 3, Nuxt UI, and i18n support for multilingual content.

items.title: E-Commerce Platform
items.description: A full-stack e-commerce solution with real-time inventory, Stripe payments, and an admin dashboard.

items.title: Task Manager App
items.description: A collaborative task management tool with drag-and-drop boards, real-time updates, and team features.

items.title: Weather Dashboard
items.description: A beautiful weather dashboard with location-based forecasts, interactive charts, and animated backgrounds.

items.title: Blog Platform
items.description: A content-driven blog with markdown support, categories, search functionality, and an RSS feed.

items.title: REST API Boilerplate
items.description: A production-ready Node.js REST API starter with JWT auth, rate limiting, and full test coverage.

contact.page_description: Have a project in mind or just want to say hello? I'd love to hear from you.
contact.success_text: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.error_text: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contact.availability: Currently available for freelance work and full-time positions.

seo.title: Evan Saleck – Full-Stack Developer
seo.description: Personal portfolio of Evan Saleck, a full-stack developer specialising in Nuxt, Vue, and Node.js.
